prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Python source files in django/django that implement migration squashing compliance: the squash migration generator, the replaced-migrations tracking, the dependency graph validation after squashing, and the squash completeness check.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the django-web-framework fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Python source files in django/django that implement migration squashing compliance: the squash migration generator, the replaced-migrations tracking, the dependency graph validation after squashing, and the squash completeness check.
